caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and a gold chain. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and speaks, gesturing with his right hand near his mouth across the sequence. Behind him is a white wall featuring the words "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside stars. To his right, a background displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". Two identical graphic overlays are visible on the screen: one on the left reading "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and another on the right stating "BOSS TALK 101 By Village Media". As the scene progresses, the man shifts his gaze and slightly changes his facial expression while continuing to talk into the microphone, his hand moving closer to his face.
